8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#150] "[iobroker-bot] Update Dependabot Configuration – Add npm Cooldown"](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.vis-jsontemplate/issues/150)

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.vis-jsontemplate/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-widgets/package.json, /widgets/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/src-widgets") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.
